name: Clarence Burns
bio: Clarence Burns serves as the Mayor of Linden, one of the two county seats of Cass County. Linden is known for its Music City Texas Theater, a beloved local venue for country and gospel music. The mayor works with the city council to maintain city services and promote the community.
campaignPromises: Support Linden's music heritage and cultural events
Improve city infrastructure and utility services
Promote economic development and small business growth
Maintain public safety and community policing
